chapter_title.en: The Prayer of the Two Eids

text: 1455 - وَ رَوَى سَمَاعَةُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «لاَ صَلاَةَ فِي اَلْعِيدَيْنِ إِلاَّ مَعَ إِمَامٍ وَ إِنْ صَلَّيْتَ وَحْدَكَ فَلاَ بَأْسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1455 - Sama’a bin Mehran narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"There is no prayer on the two Eids (Eid al-Fitr and Eid al-Adha) except with an Imam, but if you pray alone, there is no issue."
